SEQUENCE.COMMENT: renameWithFail - rename an FTP file with a framework FE0536 failure on error

BRANCH.COMMENT: if the required input is not supplied, fail

INVOKE.NAME: sFwTracetransid==$null || sFwTracetransid==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

Values.value: FE9999 - A trace or transaction id is required

INVOKE.NAME: oldname==$null || oldname=='' || newname==$null || newname==''
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE9999 - An oldname and newname are required

Values.value: FE9999 - An oldname and newname are required

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0536 Error on rename of %oldname% to %newname%

Values.value: FE0536 FTP rename failure of %oldname% to %newname%
